valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 1 Mar 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 2 Mar 2026
general_synopsis: Low 200 miles west of Rockall 974 expected Rockall 999 by midday tomorrow. Developing low moving rather quickly northwards, expected 150 miles east of Iceland 970 by same time
